notes: MAJOR per-user fix: per-user links (?sub=username) were hitting the external-generator path and returning a 127.0.0.1 error node (the '2 useless configs' bug) — now they use the local Cloudflare-IP generator and get 15-20 real rotating IPs. Per-user links are now rename-safe (matched by stable key, not username) and resolve instantly for just-created users (no more blank nginx page). Added a per-user Save button. VMess removed (unsupported on Cloudflare Workers). CDN list 404 now shows clear guidance. Main subscription was always fine.
